name: Soli
description: Soli language support for Nova: syntax highlighting, LSP-powered hover, completion, go-to-definition, rename, format, and diagnostics.

configuration.title: Soli binary
configuration.description: Path to the `soli` executable that ships the LSP server. Leave blank to use whichever `soli` is on PATH.

configuration.title: Enable language server
configuration.description: Run `soli lsp` for hover, completion, go-to-definition, rename, format, and diagnostics. Disable to fall back to grammar-only highlighting.

configuration.title: LSP trace level
configuration.description: Verbosity of the LSP server log (written to Nova's extension console).
